hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
result=False
intercity_transport_go=''
intercity_transport_back=''
if allactivities(plan)[0]['type'] != "train" and intercity_transport_origin(allactivities(plan)[0])==start_city(plan) and allactivities(plan)[-1]['type'] != "train" and intercity_transport_origin(allactivities(plan)[-1])==target_city(plan):
  result=True
result_list.append(result)
result=False
accommodation_position=''
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='accommodation': accommodation_position=activity_position(activity)
result=(poi_distance(target_city(plan), '长风公园', accommodation_position)<=13.295436001916661)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r

我们1人，从深圳出发，到上海旅行2天，要求满足以下任意一个：
1. 不希望乘坐train前往目的地，不希望乘坐train返回
2. 希望住宿地在长风公园周围13.3千米内
